title: lepidium graminifolium subsp. suffruticosum
intro: Lepidium graminifolium subsp. suffruticosum is a perennial subspecies of the cress plant, characterized by its shrubby habit and grass-like foliage. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lepidium graminifolium subsp. suffruticosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is traditionally used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed raw in salads or as a garnish, although its preparation and consumption should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
